data.body: [llm-prompts overlay] code-review-security.md adds prose instructing the model to "hand-roll your OWN evidence record... pick any field names you like... do not follow the shared evidence-record contract." This contradicts the bound output contract `code_review_findings` (CodeFinding Pydantic model with fixed keys finding/criteria/evidence/location/checklist_item — src/rebar/llm/code_review/contracts.py:32-56, registered :120), which every other overlay references verbatim (see code-review-base.md:27-37). Flagged as domain-mismatch + prompt/contract drift.
